caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario taking place in a hospital setting, as indicated by the "Sim Week" text on the screen. Three individuals, all wearing masks and gloves, are attending to a patient lying on a bed. The person on the left, dressed in blue scrubs with a stethoscope around their neck, appears to be a healthcare professional, possibly a nurse or doctor, who is actively examining the patient. The individual in the middle, also in blue scrubs, is assisting with the examination, while the person on the right, wearing a dark jacket, seems to be observing or providing support. The patient is covered with a blanket and has red hair visible. The environment includes typical hospital equipment and furniture, such as a chair and a curtain for privacy. The scene suggests a collaborative effort in a controlled training environment aimed at enhancing medical skills and procedures.
